basic_details.job_title: SIDBI Product Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI)
basic_details.short_information: Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI) has released the official Product Manager – Product and Policy Recruitment 2026 notification under Advt No. 02/2026-27. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SIDBI Product Manager – Product and Policy Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in Finance, Commerce, Economics, Business Administration, Engineering or related field from a recognised University/Institute, Post-graduate qualification such as MBA/PGDM (Finance/Marketing/Operations), or equivalent certification in Product Management / Business Analysis
qualification.details: Graduate degree in Finance, Commerce, Economics, Business Administration, Engineering or related field from a recognised University/Institute. Desirable: Post-graduate qualification such as MBA/PGDM (Finance/Marketing/Operations), or equivalent certification in Product Management / Business Analysis.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SIDBI Product Manager – Product and Policy Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for SIDBI Product Manager – Product and Policy Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SIDBI Product Manager – Product and Policy Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SIDBI Product Manager post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the SIDBI Product Manager – Product and Policy recruitment is 29th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Finance, Commerce, Economics, Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field. A Post-graduate qualification like MBA/PGDM or a certification in Product Management/Business Analysis is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Product Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Product Manager – Product and Policy post is 40 years. There are no specific minimum age requirements mentioned for this role.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Product Manager role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the SIDBI Product Manager – Product and Policy recruitment involves two stages: initial shortlisting of applications followed by a personal interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by SIDBI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Product Manager position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Product Manager – Product and Policy post will receive an annual salary ranging from Rs. 35,00,000 to Rs. 45,00,000.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this SIDBI job?
faq.answer: The application for the SIDBI Product Manager – Product and Policy recruitment must be submitted via Email. Candidates need to prepare their application and send it to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Product Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Product Manager – Product and Policy position in the Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI).

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Product Manager – Product and Policy post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this SIDBI recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the SIDBI Product Manager – Product and Policy recruitment can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all detailed information.
